title: tragacantha trimestris
intro: Tragacantha trimestris, also known as Three-leafed Milk Thistle or Trimestris, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain a high concentration of silymarin, a flavonoid complex that has been shown to have hepatoprotective and antioxidant effects. The plant is used to support liver health, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress, offering potential health benefits such as improved liver function, reduced risk of liver disease, and enhanced antioxidant defenses. Tragacantha trimestris can be prepared as a herbal supplement, tea, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
